en: Do you speak American English or British English?
ko: 미국 영어를 써? 영국 영어를 써?
ja: アメリカ英語を話す？イギリス英語を話す？
zhTW: 你說美式英語還是英式英語？
vi: Bạn nói tiếng Anh Mỹ hay tiếng Anh Anh?

en: He is taking a shower. He is having a shower.
ko: He is taking a shower. He is having a shower
ja: 彼はシャワーを浴びている。彼はシャワーを浴びている。
zhTW: He is taking a shower. He is having a shower.
vi: He is taking a shower. He is having a shower.

en: Fill in the gap. I usually go swimming the weekend.
ko: 빈칸을 채워봐. 나는 보통 주말에 수영을 가
ja: 空欄を埋めて。私は普通週末に泳ぎに行く。
zhTW: 填空。我通常週末去游泳。
vi: Điền vào chỗ trống. Tôi thường đi bơi vào cuối tuần.

en: I usually go swimming on the weekend.
ko: I usually go swimming on the weekend. I usually go swimming at the weekend
ja: I usually go swimming on the weekend.
zhTW: I usually go swimming on the weekend.
vi: I usually go swimming on the weekend.

en: I usually go swimming at the weekend.
ko: I usually go swimming on the weekend. I usually go swimming at the weekend
ja: I usually go swimming at the weekend.
zhTW: I usually go swimming at the weekend.
vi: I usually go swimming at the weekend.

en: Fill in the gap. I've used to it.
ja: 空欄を埋めて。もう慣れた。
vi: Điền vào chỗ trống. Tôi đã quen rồi.

ko: I've gotten used to it. I've got used to it

en: I've got used to it. How do you say this date?
ja: I've got used to it. この日付はどう言う？
zhTW: I've got used to it. 這個日期怎麼說？
vi: I've got used to it. Ngày này đọc thế nào?

en: Fill in the gap. I studied science university.
ja: 空欄を埋めて。大学で科学を勉強した。
zhTW: 填空。我在大學學了科學。
vi: Điền vào chỗ trống. Tôi đã học khoa học ở đại học.

ko: I studied science in university. I studied science at university.
I studied science in university. I studied science at university.

en: Did you answer most of these questions in American English or British English?
ko: 미국 영어로 대부분 답했어? 영국 영어로 답했어? 댓글로 알려줘
ja: これらの質問にアメリカ英語とイギリス英語のどちらで答えた？
zhTW: 你大部分是用美式英語還是英式英語回答的？
vi: Bạn trả lời phần lớn bằng tiếng Anh Mỹ hay tiếng Anh Anh?

ko: 미국 영어로 대부분 답했어? 영국 영어로 답했어? 댓글로 알려줘
vi: Hãy cho chúng tôi biết trong bình luận.
